'''Core Foodstuffs''' was a major macro-[[Farm/Legends|farming]] corporation that, along with other companies such as the [[Tagge Restaurant Association/Legends|Tagge Restaurant Association]] and the [[Imperial Fruit Company]], benefited from employing workers impoverished by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] agri-sector maximization policies.<ref name="DES" /> Core Foodstuffs also had heavy investments on [[Taanab/Legends|Taanab]], along with [[Arcon Multinode Agricorp]] and the Tagge Restaurant Association.<ref name="TEA" />

==Behind the scenes==
Core Foodstuffs was first mentioned in the ''[[Dark Empire Sourcebook]]'', written by [[Michael Allen Horne]], and released in [[June]] [[1993]]. Core Foodstuffs was later briefly mentioned in ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'', a reference book written by [[Jason Fry]] and [[Daniel Wallace]], and released in [[August]] [[2009]].
